sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: UnitedHealth Group은 2025년 매출 4,476억 달러를 기록하며 전년 대비 12% 성장했고, 2026년 조정 EPS 17.75달러 이상의 가이던스를 제시했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 연간 매출은 4,476억 달러로 전년 대비 12% 성장했으며, 조정 EPS는 16.35달러를 기록했습니다.
2026년 전망치로 매출 4,390억 달러 이상, 조정 EPS 17.75달러 이상을 제시하며 지속적인 성장을 예고했습니다.

businessChanges.text: Optum 부문의 운영 재정비 및 가치 기반 케어 통합 강화를 위해 새로운 리더십을 도입하고 사업 구조를 재편했습니다.
4분기 중 사이버 공격 비용, 포트폴리오 매각, 구조조정 등을 포함하여 총 16억 달러 규모의 일회성 비용을 반영했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 영업 이익은 190억 달러, 영업 현금 흐름은 197억 달러를 기록했습니다.
조정 의료비 비율(Medical Care Ratio)은 88.9%로 전년 대비 340포인트 증가했습니다.
조정 운영 비용 비율은 12.9%로 전년과 동일한 수준을 유지했습니다.

watchItems.text: 재정비된 Optum 부문의 가치 기반 케어 통합 성과와 2026년 수익성 개선 여부를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a991unherq42025.htm EX-99.1 a991unherq42025 Page 1 of 21 UnitedHealth Group Reports 2025 Results and Issues 2026 Outlook • Full Year 2025 Revenues of $447.6 Billion Grew 12% Year-Over-Year; Earnings of $13.23 Per Share; Adjusted Earnings of $16.35 Per Share • Full Year 2026 Revenue Outlook Greater Than $439.0 Billion; Earnings Outlook Greater Than $17.10 Per Share; Adjusted Earnings Greater Than $17.75 Per Share To view this information in a different format, including graphics, published on our website, click here: https://www.unitedhealthgroup.com/content/dam/UHG/PDF/investors/2025/unh-reports-2025-results-and-issues-2026- outlook.pdf. (January 27, 2026) UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) today reported full year and fourth quarter 2025 results and issued its 2026 outlook. “We confronted   Normalized numeric aliases: $447.6 Billion = 4,476억 달러; $439.0 Billion = 4,390억 달러; $447.6 = 447.6달러; $13.23 = 13.23달러; $16.35 = 16.35달러; $439.0 = 439.0달러; $17.10 = 17.10달러; $17.75 = 17.75달러.

etter serve those who count on us and continue to improve our core performance,” said Stephen Hemsley, chief executive officer of UnitedHealth Group. Consolidated revenues for 2025 were $447.6 billion, representing 12% growth year-over-year. Earnings from operations were $19.0 billion and net margin was 2.7%, while cash flows from operations were $19.7 billion, or 1.5x net income. The 2026 outlook was set for more than $439.0 billion in revenues, with earnings from operations greater than $24.0 billion and an adjusted earnings outlook greater than $17.75 per share. 2025 Key Performance Metrics • UnitedHealthcare, which served 49  Normalized numeric aliases: $447.6 billion = 4,476억 달러; $19.0 billion = 190억 달러; $19.7 billion = 197억 달러; $439.0 billion = 4,390억 달러; $24.0 billion = 240억 달러; 49.8 million = 4,980만 달러; $344.9 billion = 3,449억 달러; $270.6 billion = 2,706억 달러; $447.6 = 447.6달러; $17.75 = 17.75달러; $24.0 = 24.0달러; $344.9 = 344.9달러; $270.6 = 270.6달러; $13.23 = 13.23달러; $0.01 = 0.01달러.

• Full year and fourth quarter 2025 adjusted net earnings were $16.35 and $2.11 per share. • The reported medical care ratio of 89.1% included a 20 basis point negative impact from loss contracts included in the charge, resulting in an adjusted medical care ratio of 88.9%, or an increase of 340 basis points year-over-year. • The operating cost ratio of 13.3% included a negative 40 basis points impact from the one-time charge, resulting in an adjusted operating cost ratio of 12.9%, which was flat year-over-year. In the last six months of 2025, the company laid the foundation for more disciplined and transparent operations, stronger performance and sustained growth throughout 2026 and beyond. Key elements in the company’s mission-focused progress in the second half of 2025 have included: • Re-focusing on key markets, products and geographies. • Aligni  Normalized numeric aliases: $16.35 = 16.35달러; $2.11 = 2.11달러; 20 basis point = 20포인트; 340 basis points = 340포인트; 40 basis points = 40포인트.

igher medical trends and the impact of health care policy changes. • Re-baselining operations at Optum, including new leaders who have refocused and strengthened the commitment to integrated value-based care. Page 2 of 21 The company has taken steps to enhance its transparency, including releasing the results of its first independent reviews of business practices, with additional reviews and actions under way. The company completed wide-ranging actions that were included in a fourth quarter charge of $1.6 billion net of taxes, or $1.78 per share. The impacts were largely non-cash and were excluded from adjusted earnings and adjusted earnings per share. The charge consisted of the following: ($ in millions, except per share data) Impact to 2025 Net Earnings Final Cyberattack Costs $(799) Net Portfolio Divestitures $442 Restructuring and Other $(2,521) Total Impa  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $1.78 = 1.78달러; $442 = 442달러; 2,521 million = 25억 2,100만 달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
